dictionaries.sowpods: Collins Scrabble Words (CSW, formerly SOWPODS) — the word list used in English-language tournament Scrabble in most countries except the US, Thailand and Canada.
dictionaries.twl: NASPA Word List (NWL, formerly TWL/OTCWL/OWL) — the official word list for tournament Scrabble in the USA and Canada.

dictionaries.ods8: Officiel du Dictionnaire Scrabble, 8th edition (ODS8) — the official French-language tournament Scrabble word list.

dictionaries.wordlist: General German word list (used by the Tanglet word-game project), not an official tournament list.

dictionaries.file2017: Lexicón FILE 2017 — official word list of the Federación Internacional de Léxico en Español (FILE).
dictionaries.fise2: Lexicón FISE-2 2009 — official word list of the Federación Internacional de Scrabble en Español (FISE).

dictionaries.letterlicious: General Dutch word list sourced from Letterlicious, merged with words from OpenTaal's wordlist (5+ letter words only) to fill gaps such as present participles (deelwoorden). Not an official tournament list.

dictionaries.sjp: SJP.PL "growy" (game) word list — a Polish dictionary and orthographic word list curated for word games.

dictionaries.wordlist: Brazilian Portuguese word list derived from the LibreOffice pt_BR spell-check dictionary, expanded to include compound-word components.

dictionaries.loc5: Lista Oficială de Cuvinte (LOC) 5.0 — the last fully official Romanian Scrabble word list.
dictionaries.loc6: Lista Oficială de Cuvinte (LOC) 6.0 — LOC 5.0 plus unofficial revisions from dexonline.ro not yet incorporated into an official release.

dictionaries.zinga: ZINGA — Italian Scrabble word list based on the Zingarelli dictionary.

dictionaries.moein: Word list extracted from the Moein Persian-to-Persian dictionary. No official/standard tile distribution could be confidently sourced, so tiles.json is omitted for this language.

dictionaries.kelimelik: Word list modeled to closely match the database used by the Kelimelik mobile word game.
dictionaries.tla: Word list based on the Turkish Language Association (TDK) dictionary — includes abbreviations, chemical symbols, etc. not normally valid in word games.

dictionaries.kbbi: Single-word list cleaned from KBBI v6.1.0 (Kamus Besar Bahasa Indonesia), Indonesia's official dictionary. No official/standard tile distribution could be confidently sourced, so tiles.json is omitted for this language.
